items.question: How do I find the right size?
items.answer: We recommend checking our Size Guide page for detailed measurements. Our sizes run true to standard Indian sizing (XXS to 5XL). If you are between sizes, we suggest sizing up for a more comfortable fit, especially for co-ord sets and palazzo styles.

items.question: What is your return and exchange policy?
items.answer: We offer a 7-day return and exchange window from the date of delivery. To initiate a return or exchange, please WhatsApp us at our support number with your order number and reason. Items must be unused, unwashed, and in original packaging with tags intact.

items.question: How long does delivery take?
items.answer: Standard delivery takes 3–7 business days depending on your location. We also offer Express Delivery for select pin codes, which delivers within 1–3 business days. You will receive a tracking link once your order is shipped.

items.question: Is Cash on Delivery (COD) available?
items.answer: Yes! We offer COD on orders up to ₹5,000. COD is available at select pin codes across India. Please note that COD orders have a nominal handling charge of ₹50.

items.question: How do I care for my Label Wink garments?
items.answer: Care instructions vary by fabric. Most of our cotton and rayon pieces are best hand-washed in cold water with mild detergent. Avoid bleach and direct sunlight for prolonged periods. Please check the care label on your specific garment for detailed instructions.

items.question: What is the exchange process?
items.answer: To exchange a product, WhatsApp us within 7 days of delivery with your order number and preferred size/colour. We will arrange a pickup and ship the replacement once we receive the original item. Exchanges are subject to availability.

items.question: Do you accept bulk or wholesale orders?
items.answer: Yes, we do! We work with boutiques and resellers across India. Please reach out to us at support@labelwink.co with your requirements and we will get back to you with our wholesale catalogue and pricing.

items.question: How can I get support on WhatsApp?
items.answer: You can reach our customer care team on WhatsApp for order queries, returns, exchanges, and styling advice. Our WhatsApp support is available Monday–Saturday, 10 AM to 7 PM IST. Simply click the WhatsApp icon on our website to start a chat.
